statements.query: MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[:RESOURCE]->(n:OCIUser) WHERE n.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH n LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DETACH DELETE (n)
MATCH (:CloudanixWorkspace{id: $WORKSPACE_ID})-[:OWNER]->(:OCITenancy{id: $OCI_TENANCY_ID})-[r:RESOURCE]->(:OCIUser) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE (r)
